testcase.name: test_list_and_dict_literals

failure.message: tinylang.errors.ParseError: Unexpected token PUNCT ] at line 1, col 19

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:72: in test_list_and_dict_literals p = parse('let xs = [1, 2, 3,]; let d = {"a": 1, "b": 2};') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:349: in parse return parser.parse_program() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:34: in parse_program stmts.append(self.parse_statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:41: in parse_statement return self.parse_let_stmt() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:76: in parse_let_stmt value = self.parse_expression() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in parse_expression return self.parse_assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse_assignment expr = self.parse_logical_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:188: in parse_logical_or expr = self.parse_logical_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:196: in parse_logical_and expr = self.parse_equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:204: in parse_equality expr = self.parse_comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:212: in parse_comparison expr = self.parse_additive() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:220: in parse_additive expr = self.parse_multiplicative() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:228: in parse_multiplicative expr = self.parse_unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:240: in parse_unary return self.parse_postfix() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:243: in parse_postfix expr = self.parse_primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:297: in parse_primary items.append(self.parse_expression()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:149: in parse_expression return self.parse_assignment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:175: in parse_assignment expr = self.parse_logical_or() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:188: in parse_logical_or expr = self.parse_logical_and() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:196: in parse_logical_and expr = self.parse_equality() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:204: in parse_equality expr = self.parse_comparison() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:212: in parse_comparison expr = self.parse_additive() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:220: in parse_additive expr = self.parse_multiplicative() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:228: in parse_multiplicative expr = self.parse_unary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:240: in parse_unary return self.parse_postfix() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:243: in parse_postfix expr = self.parse_primary() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:307: in parse_primary raise ParseError(f"Unexpected token {token.kind} {token.value}", token.line, token.col) E tinylang.errors.ParseError: Unexpected token PUNCT ] at line 1, col 19

testcase.name: test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names

failure.message: tinylang.errors.ParseError: Expected IDENT None, got PUNCT ( at line 1, col 5

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:102: in test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names p1 = parse("for (x) in xs { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:349: in parse return parser.parse_program() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:34: in parse_program stmts.append(self.parse_statement()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:47: in parse_statement return self.parse_for_stmt() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:104: in parse_for_stmt name_token = self.expect("IDENT") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:24: in expect raise ParseError( E tinylang.errors.ParseError: Expected IDENT None, got PUNCT ( at line 1, col 5
